name: hermes-web-ui-local-overlay
purpose: Replayable local Hermes Web UI enhancements for the Hermes WeChat distribution kit.
validation_gates: npm test -- tests/client/semantic-message.test.ts tests/shared/chat-protocol.test.ts tests/server/chat-run-message-flush.test.ts tests/client/friendly-notice.test.ts tests/server/friendly-error.test.ts
shadow smoke on an isolated port
notes: This directory intentionally contains source changes only, not built Web UI artifacts.
Do not commit node_modules, dist bundles, tokens, user state, or local runtime paths.
